response.justification: James has extensive experience as a full-stack engineer with over 12 years in the field, including roles as a Senior Software Developer and Staff Engineer. His expertise aligns well with the required stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React) and responsibilities, including architecture, scalability, and collaboration with product teams. His work on AI-agent infrastructure and open-source projects demonstrates adaptability and innovation. However, his experience with Nest.js and Vitest is not explicitly mentioned, and his recent role at re:cinq may not fully align with the primary stack.
strengths: Strong full-stack development experience with TypeScript, Node.js, and React
Proven expertise in AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling
Diverse technical background with proficiency in multiple languages (JavaScript, TypeScript, DLang, Java, etc.)
concerns: Limited explicit mention of Nest.js and Vitest in experience
Recent role focuses heavily on AI-agent infrastructure, which may not align with the primary stack
Lack of direct experience with Kotlin/Java in the most recent roles

key_factors.factor: AI-agent infrastructure and AI development experience
Recent focus on AI-agent infrastructure vs. primary stack alignment
